note: RL charge-attacker. S1: on full-burst enter, buffs the allies who already burst this rotation (target burstCasters, more faithful than the parser's blanket 'allies') with ATK 60% of caster's ATK and True Damage 50% for 10s; the 10% lifesteal is defensive, skipped. S2 Flash Grenade Toss REWORKED (tier audit): exact model replaces the old hitCount:3 blend (which assumed ~25% FB uptime; validated fights run ~75%, a ~2x undercount). Baseline: 420% True-Damage dot every 2s for 10s on EVERY full-burst enter; her burst rider (interval ▼1s for 10s) is a SECOND identical every-2s stream on her own burstCast, so during her burst windows the combined rate is exactly 1/s. True-flavored, so her S1/burst True Damage ▲ buffs apply only to the grenades (engine gates trueDamagePct by flavor).
